title: NHRA Drag Racing Mod
description: This mod adds drag racing cars in Minecraft
body: This mod adds Cars for drag racing and for regular racing. There are cars of different brands in fashion, such as Ford, Chevrolet, and Mazda. You can also drive cars and sit in them. To get into the car, click on it with the right mouse button to break it with the left button. ATTENTION: The vehicle's hitboxes are quite small, so for convenience, enable hitboxes using F3+B. It is also planned to add motorcycles for drag racing and trucks. The mod is not completely ready, there will be updates in the future. Features: Simple mechanics of cars, and cars in the style of Minecraft. The mod was made using Mcreator and car models in Blockbench. Version 1.16.5. My YouTube channel: [https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4FXfddNWOSY2tCX8wTmvBw]
